sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19233" key="balanodo/kh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰλᾰνο-δόκη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δέχομαι</etym>) <sense id="n19233.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">socket in a door-post to receive the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βάλανος</foreign> (<bibl n="urn:cts:latinLit:phi0978.phi001:11:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.4</biblScope> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:18:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.3</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
